title: Centered Crosshair Fix
description: Fixes the crosshair to be accurately centered on the screen
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a4173ac93a82180d56057937bd62c811cc9283c.png)

# Centered Crosshair Fix

The crosshair in the vanilla is not actually centered on the screen. This resource pack fixes the crosshair, which is off-center, to be accurately positioned at the center of the screen.

If the GUI scale is odd, the crosshair will be off-center by 1 pixel.
